title: BEM-920 worker review
objective:
Create file governance/audit/internal/results/BEM920_WORKER_SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL_REVIEW.md with content # BEM-920 WORKER SYSTEM EVOLUTION PROTOCOL REVIEW
Status: WORKER_REVIEW_READY
Decision: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES
Findings:
- Claude APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS must be treated as mandatory input, not optional advice.
- The new critical gap about elements_registry is valid. Objects and worker contours must not remain only string IDs inside objects_registry.
- BEM-920 must become the first implementation phase: element registry, element prompts, object-to-element references, component inventory and workflow concurrency baseline.
- Prompt approval must be explicit. Existing object prompts and new element prompts must be listed for operator approval.
- BEM-921 must harden proof: release_proof_manifest commit_sha cannot be null and must come from CI/Git context, not self-written by LLM.
- BEM-922 must implement Telegram input schema and mapping to managed channel. Telegram remains one module in the full system.
- BEM-923 must remain operator gate for secrets, production webhook, schedule/daemon, issue #31, paid API, LLM runtime and real pilot choices.
- BEM-924..BEM-928 should close dispatch lifecycle, object lifecycle, managed channel consumer, report pipeline, E2E tests and Claude re-audit package.
Recommended roadmap:
- BEM-920: Elements SSOT, prompts and component inventory freeze.
- BEM-921: Proof hardening, release manifest and CI/Git SHA non-null proof.
- BEM-922: Telegram input envelope, mapping and General Director routing using existing webhook.
- BEM-923: Operator gate for production secrets/webhook/schedule/daemon/issue/pilot/LLM runtime decisions.
- BEM-924: Dispatch lifecycle and auto-trigger design/implementation for queue item added.
- BEM-925: Object execution lifecycle with deterministic PASS criteria and role reports.
- BEM-926: Managed channel consumer, event log completeness, canonical report pipeline, report_period_config owner OPERATOR.
- BEM-927: E2E test package with separate mock_status and production_status.
- BEM-928: Claude re-audit bundle checklist fixed before assembly and release decision.
Prompt section recommendation:
- Existing prompts: curator_prompt.md if present, general_director_prompt.md, director_prompt.md, worker_prompt.md.
- New required prompts: wrk_c1_registry_architecture_prompt.md, wrk_c2_rules_communication_prompt.md, wrk_c3_execution_testing_product_prompt.md.
- Optional next prompts: gd_curator_prompt.md, dir_curator_prompt.md, wrk_curator_prompt.md if the current curator prompt is not enough.
Operator approval needed:
- Approve prompt naming, responsibilities, prohibited actions and reporting routes.
Status recommendation:
- SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS.
No issue comments.
